Upside pivot is at 6842.50
target is 6910.39
The pivot is very hard to break, it is sticky and functionates as a higher level of a ladder. 6855/60 is the “event horizont” of the pivot’s stickiness, and 6875/80 is where any upward move can be braken and confirmed or rejected. Until spx brake6875/80
